Description: Rendering 'Fully Covered' when policy has explicit carve-outs for natural disasters, meaning the user is not protected against earthquakes.
User Harm: Creates false sense of security; user may assume a claim is covered when it is explicitly mapped to an exclusion.

Description: Displaying 'No Deductible' globally when glass breaking has a 25% non-network deductible or when under-25 drivers have a 2% conditional deductible.
User Harm: Financial surprise during a claim due to unexpected out-of-pocket costs at non-network providers.

Description: Treating 'Rayiç Değer' (Market Value) as a fixed absolute guarantee calculated from average market price, instead of a dynamic depreciating value.
User Harm: Expectation mismatch on total payout; users assume a guaranteed sum rather than a variable depreciation-adjusted value.

Description: Silently defaulting missing Premium currency to TRY, causing massive misrepresentations for commercial transport policies billed in EUR.
User Harm: Incorrect financial expectations, especially damaging for high-value commercial or specialized policies.

Description: Overconfident AI Insights stating 'Free Towing Included' without specifying the 'up to 1500 TRY' sublimit.
User Harm: Misrepresentation of the contract; user relies on LLM generalization instead of their specific policy terms, leading to stranded costs.
